title: astelma spirale
intro: Astelma spirale, also known as Lamiophlomis rotata, is a flowering plant belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant is native to Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Astelma spirale include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory infections, and alleviate digestive issues. It can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and is also used in some traditional remedies as a tincture or essential oil.
